## `// whoami`

<img align="right" width="340" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/abhisheknaiidu/abhisheknaiidu/master/code.gif" />

```typescript
const neetesh: Developer = {
  name      : "Neetesh Kumar",
  title     : "Full Stack Engineer + AI Systems Builder",
  location  : "Greater Noida, UP, India 🇮🇳",
  education : "B.Tech CSE (AI & Data Science) — GNIOT '26",

  currentlyBuilding: [
    "Ride With Guide — Tourism SaaS @ Production",
    "NeuralGrid — Distributed AI Computing",
    "AI Agents with RAG + LangChain",
  ],

  experience: {
    "Ride With Guide" : "Founder & Full-Stack Engineer (Apr 2026–Now)",
    "Bitmax Technology" : "Full Stack Developer (Feb 2026–Present)",
  },

  superpower : "Turn ideas into shipped, scalable products",
  status     : "🟢 Open to SDE / Full-Stack / AI Engineer roles",
};
```

## `// experience`

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 🚖 Ride With Guide
**Founder & Full-Stack Engineer**
`Apr 2026 – Present`

Tourism SaaS connecting tourists with verified rider-guides across 8+ cities.

- 100+ REST APIs · Node.js · Express · MongoDB
- Real-time booking · live chat · GPS via Socket.io
- Razorpay · Cloudinary · OTP · automated payouts
- 3 React apps: Tourist, Rider, Admin

[![Tourist](https://img.shields.io/badge/Tourist_App-a855f7?style=flat-square)](https://rwg-tourist.vercel.app/)
[![Rider](https://img.shields.io/badge/Rider_App-a855f7?style=flat-square)](https://rwg-rider.vercel.app/)

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 💻 Bitmax Technology
**Full Stack Developer**
`Feb 2026 – Present`

Building production-grade web systems with modern full stack architecture.

- JWT authentication · RBAC · secure REST APIs
- React UI with animations · protected routes
- WebSockets · WebRTC real-time features
- End-to-end API testing with Postman

</td>
</tr>
</table>

---

## `// featured.projects`

<br/>

### 🌾 Krishi Mitra — AI Smart Agriculture System
> MERN · FastAPI · Deep Learning · MobileNet CNN

[![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/🌱_Live_Demo-22c55e?style=for-the-badge)](https://krishimitra-alpha.vercel.app/)

```
✦ MobileNet CNN — real-time crop disease detection via image upload
✦ FastAPI backend · Python ML pipeline · disease classification
✦ NPK · pH · rainfall · temperature-based recommendation engine
✦ Weather alerts · treatment suggestions · Nodemailer notifications
```

---

### 🧠 NeuralGrid — Distributed AI Computing
> Node.js · WebSocket · TensorFlow.js · CNN · Federated Learning

[![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/⚡_Live_Demo-3b82f6?style=for-the-badge)](https://neural-grid.onrender.com/)

```
✦ WebSocket mesh — ML task distribution across N idle devices
✦ CNN + Federated Learning — privacy-preserved distributed training
✦ Published npm package: neuralgrid-agent (one-command onboarding)
✦ Works on Windows · Mac · Linux — no GPU needed
```

---

### 🌐 Qrownd — Community Problem-Solving Platform
> React · Node.js · Socket.io · Firebase · Tailwind CSS

[![Live](https://img.shields.io/badge/🔴_Live_Demo-ef4444?style=for-the-badge)](https://qrownd-frontend.vercel.app/)

```
✦ Real-time Q&A threads · Socket.io live updates
✦ Firebase push notifications · upvote/solution system
✦ Tag-based discovery · moderation · user reputation engine
```
